subcodes.first_line: Hearken to what the departing Dove revealeth unto thee, as He prepareth to leave the realm of 'Iráq  --  such are the methods of God decreed for His Messengers
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمع ما تلقیک حمامه الفراق حین الذی یسافر عن شطر العراق و هذا من سنه الله
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @growth of the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
